title: Atik Import Export
description: A bilingual brand and marketing site for a logistics and import/export firm, built for speed and reach across two languages.
about: Atik Import Export needed a credible, fast-loading presence that speaks to partners in both English and Turkish. We designed and built a fully bilingual site with localized routing, so every page reads natively in either language.
The build pairs a clean component system with subtle motion, a rate-limited contact pipeline that sends professional email notifications, and a structure tuned for performance and search visibility.

title: Royal World
description: A headless Shopify storefront delivering a fast, server-rendered shopping experience.
about: Royal World needed an online store that felt as premium as the products. We built a headless storefront on Next.js Commerce, connecting Shopify's catalogue to a fully server-rendered React front end.
Browsing, cart and checkout use React Server Components, Server Actions and optimistic UI for an instant feel, deployed on the store's own domain.

title: Sagando Bungalows
description: An immersive marketing site for a beachfront boutique resort in Zanzibar, with direct booking hand-off.
about: Sagando Bungalows is a boutique beachfront resort in Michamvi Kae, Zanzibar. The site had to capture the calm of the place while driving bookings, so we led with a full-screen animated hero and a booking widget that pre-fills and hands off cleanly to Booking.com.
Rotating announcements, a room showcase and an experiences section are stitched together with GSAP animation and Lenis smooth scroll for a considered, unhurried feel on every device.

title: Wooah!
description: A hypertrophy training tracker with progressive overload, volume science and mesocycle planning.
about: Wooah! is a 6-day Push/Pull/Legs training app for lifters who take hypertrophy seriously. It tracks progressive overload, weekly volume and full mesocycle planning, with real-time sync so your data is always current across devices.
Built on Convex for a reactive, real-time backend, it ships as an installable PWA with offline support, progress charts and a bilingual (EN/PL) interface.

title: Girit Healthcare
description: An appointment scheduling and patient management platform for a healthcare provider.
about: Girit needed a modern, trustworthy platform for healthcare appointment scheduling and patient management. We built a responsive system with an appointment calendar, validated intake and contact forms, and a clean, accessible interface with dark and light themes.
Backed by Supabase, the platform pairs server actions and schema-validated data with a component system built for clarity - the kind of unglamorous reliability healthcare products live or die by.

title: Crypto Predict
description: A full-stack machine-learning system that forecasts cryptocurrency prices with live training and dashboards.
about: Crypto Predict is a research-grade platform that forecasts cryptocurrency prices using multiple deep-learning architectures - CNN, LSTM and hybrid CNN-LSTM models - with real-time training and hyperparameter optimization.

A WebSocket pipeline streams training progress and live predictions into an interactive dashboard, all backed by a production stack: PostgreSQL, Redis, and Prometheus/Grafana monitoring, containerised with Docker.

title: Interactive 3D Portfolio
description: A server-rendered portfolio site with interactive 3D and smooth motion.
about: An interactive portfolio built to show work with a little more dimension - literally. We paired TanStack Start's SSR with Three.js scenes and Framer Motion transitions for a fast, tactile browsing experience.
TanStack Router handles type-safe, file-based routing while React Query and Supabase keep project data and content in sync behind the scenes.

title: Untab Studio
description: Our own studio platform - a content-driven site engineered for motion and performance.
about: Untab Studio is our home on the web, and our proof of work. Every project, post and page is orchestrated through Sanity and rendered with Next.js 16's App Router and Cache Components.
GSAP drives the motion system - bidirectional scroll reveals and considered micro-interactions - on top of React 19's compiler and a CSS-first Tailwind 4 foundation, all managed with Bun.
